# FoxPay

FoxPay is a mobile tap game and Web3 gaming universe at https://foxpay.live/.

Important public pages:

- Main game: https://foxpay.live/
- FoxPay information page: https://foxpay.live/story
- Terms and Conditions: https://foxpay.live/terms

Summary:

FoxPay combines tap gameplay, daily tasks, video missions, CPA-style campaigns, referrals, roulette tickets, skins, packages and FOX rewards. The FoxPay information page describes the active game system, rewards, referrals, rankings and mobile-first gameplay.

Legal:

The Terms and Conditions page explains that the FoxPay token is not legal tender, not a security, not a guaranteed investment and not a promise of economic return.
